name: bayesian-mixture-models
title: Bayesian Mixture Models — Soft Clustering with Uncertainty
description: Fit Gaussian mixture models with PyMC for probabilistic clustering: posterior distributions on cluster means, variances, and weights plus per-point soft assignments with uncertainty. Includes LOO-CV model selection for K, sklearn EM comparison, and applications beyond clustering (zero-inflation, outlier detection, regime switching). Runnable marimo notebook included.
